text: Greedy algorithms make locally optimal choices hoping for global optimum. Fast but require correctness proof. Examples: Huffman coding, Prim/Kruskal (MST), activity selection, fractional knapsack.
Greedy algorithms make locally optimal choices hoping for global optimum. Fast but require correctness proof. Examples: Huffman coding, Prim/Kruskal (MST), activity selection, fractional knapsack.
